title: Director of Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Rural PK-12 CSD (~1,426 students) in Steuben County, also known as Haverling. Superintendent is Kelly Houck (khouck@bathcsd.org, started July 2023, replacing Joseph Rumsey). District operates UPK program. Email pattern first initial + last name @ bathcsd.org confirmed. Component district of GST BOCES.

title: Interim Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small rural North Country PK-12 district (~900 students). Susan Todd was interim through 2024-25; Danielle Brown serving as interim superintendent thereafter. No dedicated curriculum director listed — superintendent is best ECE point of contact. Component of St. Lawrence-Lewis BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Elementary Education
notes: Corning-Painted Post Area School District (CPP) serves ~4,500 students PK-12. Operates the Frank F. Pierce Early Childhood Center (district-sponsored ECE building serving 150+ preschoolers — strong ECE buying signal). Superintendent Michelle Caulfield (5-year contract extension July 2025). Email domain @cppmail.com confirmed.

title: Director of Teaching, Learning & Accountability
notes: Bloomfield Central School District (also known as East Bloomfield) — Bloomfield Elementary serves UPK to grade 5. Superintendent Andrew Doell (adoell@bloomfieldcsd.org). Component of Wayne-Finger Lakes BOCES. UPK in place.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small rural Allegany County PK-12 district. No dedicated curriculum director — superintendent is correct ECE contact for this size district. Component of Cattaraugus-Allegany BOCES.

district: FORT EDWARD UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small PK-12 UFSD in Washington County (~450 students). Operates Universal Pre-K with curriculum-based assessments 3x/year, aligned to NYS Prekindergarten Foundation. Issued UPK RFP for 2025-2026 — active ECE buying signal. Component of WSWHE BOCES.

district: GARDEN CITY UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Affluent Nassau County K-12 UFSD. UPK program launching September 2025 — first-time PreK at Homestead School & Harbor Child Care in Roslyn. Major NEW UPK launch — top ECE buying signal. Dr. Alice Bowman appointed Feb 2024 replacing interim Judy Barbera. Email pattern first initial + last @ gardencity.k12.ny.us.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Tiny rural Otsego County PK-12 district (~315 students). New superintendent search underway (June 2025 news), so this contact may transition. Superintendent is correct contact for size. Component of ONC BOCES.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Marcus Whitman CSD serves Towns of Gorham and Middlesex (Ontario/Yates counties). 4 schools: 2 elementary (Gorham Elementary & Middlesex Valley), MS, HS. Small rural district — superintendent appropriate ECE contact. Component of Wayne-Finger Lakes BOCES.

district: GREENBURGH-NORTH CASTLE UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Special Act District serving ~300 students grades 7-12 with special needs (autism, severe emotional/behavioral). Operates Kenneth B. Clark Academy in Dobbs Ferry. NOT a typical ECE prospect — grades 7-12 only, no PreK. Dr. McGuffog is NYCASE Superintendent of the Year (2020). Low ECE priority.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Rural Oswego County PK-12 district (~1,285 students). Serves Pre-K through 12. Email pattern first initial + last name @ hannibalcsd.org confirmed. Component of Oswego County BOCES.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Very small rural PK-12 district in Washington County (NOT to be confused with New Hartford CSD in Oneida County). Serves towns of Fort Edward, Fort Ann, Salem, Argyle, Hebron, Granville, Hartford. Superintendent is correct ECE contact. Component of WSWHE BOCES.

title: Director of Student Programs & Curriculum
notes: Herkimer CSD PK-12 district in Mohawk Valley. Michelle Ploss owns curriculum + McKinney-Vento liaison role. Superintendent Kathleen Carney. Component of Herkimer-Fulton-Hamilton-Otsego BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Large Nassau County K-12 UFSD (~5,000 students). Dr. Piciullo began July 14, 2025 — recent leadership transition. Previously principal at South Ocean Middle (Patchogue-Medford) for 11 years. New AS for C&I = strong ECE buying signal.

title: Director of Curriculum and Technology
notes: Small Erie/Wyoming County PK-12 district (~769 students). Superintendent Cathy Fabiatos. NOTE: Sarah Wittmeyer reportedly transitioned to Lancaster CSD as Director of Secondary Education — verify role before outreach. Component of Erie 1 BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Instruction
notes: Suburban Rochester PK-12 district (~2,748 students). Dr. Larsen appointed March 2023. Superintendent Gene Mancuso. Email pattern first initial + last @ hflcsd.org confirmed. Component of Monroe 1 BOCES.

title: Executive Director of Teaching and Learning
notes: Small Columbia County City SD (~1,800 students). Dr. Kortright-Torres hired June 2024 — NEW hire signals curriculum review. Hudson CSD curriculum initiatives presented to BOE Sept 2024 (curriculum review = strong buying signal). Alyssa Sabbatino (former Interim Director of C&I) departed. Hudson is also a Science of Reading early adopter region.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Large rural PK-12 district (~3,600 students) in Jefferson County, includes Fort Drum military families. Superintendent Troy Decker. Operates Indian River Intermediate plus PK programming. Component of Jefferson-Lewis BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Suffolk County K-12 UFSD. Dr. Giacchetto owns PreK-12 curriculum. District operates UPK aligned to NYS Pre-K Learning Standards (ELA, Math, Social Studies, Science, Art, STEAM, Fine Motor). Component of Eastern Suffolk BOCES.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Very small rural PK-12 district (~150 students) in Schoharie County. Single building, full-day Kindergarten with Reading Recovery. Superintendent is correct ECE contact at this size. Previous superintendent Carl Mummenthey left for Niskayuna 2022. Component of ONC BOCES.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Suburban Syracuse PK-12 district in Onondaga County (~1,500 students). Operates Elbridge Elementary, MS, HS. No standalone curriculum director surfaced — superintendent is best contact. Component of OCM BOCES.

district: KIRYAS JOEL VILLAGE UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Unique Hasidic-community UFSD in Orange County, ~250 students with disabilities only (rest of community attends private yeshivas). 246 staff. Limited typical ECE focus. Mailing address: 48 Bakertown Rd, Suite 401, Monroe, NY 10950.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Tiny Hamilton County PK-9 district in Speculator (in the Adirondacks, ~70 students). Students typically go to Wells or Indian Lake for HS. Very small district — superintendent is only viable ECE contact. Component of HFM BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum, Instruction and Technology
notes: Niagara County PK-12 district (~2,000 students). Recognized as Leader in Me Lighthouse School (2024) — quality program signal. Superintendent Paul J. Casseri. Email confirmed @lew-port.com. Component of Orleans-Niagara BOCES.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Nassau County K-12 UFSD. NEW UPK launching for the FIRST TIME in 2026-27 school year — 2 Pre-K classes at Maurice W. Downing Primary School. MAJOR ECE buying signal (greenfield UPK launch). Dr. Lewis is veteran superintendent (former Plainview-Old Bethpage, East Williston).

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Suffolk County (North Fork) K-12 UFSD with Cutchogue East Elementary. Active ELA K-12 and math 5-8 curriculum review = buying signal. Declining enrollment + ongoing consolidation talks with Southold. Email @mufsd.com domain confirmed.

district: MOUNT PLEASANT-BLYTHEDALE UNION FREE SCHOOL DISTRICT
title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Highly specialized Special Act District serving K-12 medically-fragile children at Blythedale Children's Hospital in Valhalla. Beovich became superintendent July 2024 after long-tenured Emily Hersh retired (28 years). NOT a typical ECE prospect — hospital-based program. Low ECE priority.

title: Community Superintendent, District 4
notes: East Harlem (96th-125th St) plus Wards Island & Randalls Island. NYC DOE sub-district. NYC operates citywide Pre-K for All and 3-K for All — district-level ECE staff oversee program implementation. Returned to D4 as superintendent in 2020. Office at 160 East 120th Street.

title: Community Superintendent, District 9
notes: Bronx district covering Highbridge, Concourse, Morrisania, ~48 schools. Sherman became superintendent 2021. Deputy Supts Jasmin Varela & Anthony Rivera. NYC operates Pre-K for All & 3-K for All. Email pattern follows NYC DOE: <first letter+last>+<num>@schools.nyc.gov; verify exact pattern.

title: Community Superintendent, District 14
notes: Brooklyn district covering Williamsburg, Greenpoint, parts of Bed-Stuy & Bushwick. Cintron became superintendent ~2022. Office at 215 Heyward Street, Brooklyn. NYC 3-K for All and Pre-K for All citywide.

title: Community Superintendent, District 19
notes: Brooklyn district covering East New York, Cypress Hills, Starrett City, City Line, New Lots, Spring Creek, Highland Park. 34 schools. Dr. Collins since 2021. Deputy Supt Irene K. Spence. Office at 590 Sheffield Ave.

title: Interim Acting Community Superintendent, District 24
notes: Queens district covering Ridgewood, Maspeth, Glendale, Middle Village, Elmhurst, Corona, Woodside, Long Island City, Sunnyside. Among most-overcrowded NYC districts. Rivera is interim acting — leadership transition. Verify exact email.

title: Community Superintendent, District 29
notes: Northeast Queens covering Cambria Heights, Hollis, Holliswood, Queens Village, St. Albans, Springfield Gardens, Laurelton, Brookville, Rosedale. Dr. Bonds is current superintendent. Office at 222-14 Jamaica Ave. NYC 3-K & Pre-K for All citywide.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Rural PK-12 district (~700 students) in Clinton County (Ellenburg Depot). Component of CV-TEC/Champlain Valley Educational Services BOCES. Curriculum aligned to NYS Common Core / NGLS. Superintendent appropriate ECE contact at this scale.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Tioga County PK-12 district (~1,973 students). Owego Elementary recognized as 'Promising Practices' school. Dr. Green has PLC/Solution Tree background — instructional focus. Component of Tioga Tompkins BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Mid-sized Oneida County City SD (~4,500 students). DePerno owns curriculum K-12 (Director of Secondary: Melissa Sisco; Director of Elementary: Dana Benzo). Bellamy Elementary shows strong growth — ECE program area. Operates UPK.

title: Superintendent of Schools
notes: Clinton County PK-12 district based in Dannemora (~1,500 students). $3.3M budget shortfall reported 2026 — fiscal pressure. Component of CV-TEC BOCES. No dedicated curriculum director surfaced; superintendent is best contact.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Suffolk County K-12 UFSD. UPK program aligned to NYS Pre-K Learning Standards. DiMeola appointed July 2023, oversees PreK-12 curriculum. Superintendent Marc Ferris. Component of Eastern Suffolk BOCES.

title: Director of Teaching & Learning
notes: Small Rensselaer County PK-12 district in Castleton-on-Hudson. Sabbatino is NBCT, moved from Mechanicville CSD (where she was Asst Supt for School Improvement). Superintendent Jason Chevrier (jchevrier@schodack.k12.ny.us). New curriculum leader = buying signal.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Curriculum and Instruction
notes: Schenectady County PK-12 district (~2,500 students). Recent reimagining/elementary consolidation — Glen-Worden Elementary closure 2024. K-5 retained. Superintendent Susan Swartz (SSwartz@sgcsd.net). Email domain @sgcsd.net (not the website domain).

title: Interim Superintendent of Schools
notes: Small rural Cayuga County PK-12 district in Aurora. LEADERSHIP TRANSITION: John J. Lawrence (currently Skaneateles principal) takes over as superintendent July 1, 2026. Worth reaching out to Lawrence (jlawrence@skanschools.org currently) ahead of transition. Component of Cayuga-Onondaga BOCES.

title: Assistant Superintendent for Instruction
notes: Suburban Rochester (Ontario County) PreK-12 district. Dr. Tim Terranova is Superintendent (terranova@victorschools.org). Karen Finter owns instruction including PreK programming. Component of Wayne-Finger Lakes BOCES.
